heading: Register of protected plant varieties
label: 2329 Register of protected plant varieties
text: The Secretary shall maintain a register of descriptions of United States protected plant varieties.
notes: Amendments1980— substituted “descriptions” for “published specifications”, and struck out provisions requiring maintenance of a file for other information.Pub. L. 96–574
amendments: Amendments1980— substituted “descriptions” for “published specifications”, and struck out provisions requiring maintenance of a file for other information.Pub. L. 96–574
